pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.7.4 to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.x ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and lacks Jakarta EE 9+ namespace support required by modern libraries; upgrading is necessary for compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: The build configuration must reflect the target JDK version to ensure correct compilation and runtime behavior on Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated MySQL connector artifact with the new Jakarta-compatible artifact.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifact 'mysql-connector-java' is deprecated and may not be compatible with Spring Boot 3.x / Jakarta EE namespaces; the new artifact 'mysql-connector-j' is required.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Spring Boot Starter Validation dependency to enable Jakarta validation support.
Remove explicit version from Jakarta Validation API dependency to let Spring Boot manage it.

src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/contro.general_idea: Migrate validation annotation import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/contro.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.validation does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3+).

src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/entity.general_idea: Migrate JPA imports from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/entity.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.persistence does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3+).

src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/entity.general_idea: Migrate JPA entity annotation from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence.
src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/entity.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/entity.general_idea: Migrate JPA generated value annotation from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence.
src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/entity.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/entity.general_idea: Migrate JPA generation strategy annotation from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence.
src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/entity.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/entity.general_idea: Migrate JPA ID annotation from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence.
src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/entity.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/entity.general_idea: Migrate validation email constraint annotation from javax.validation to jakarta.validation.
src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/entity.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/entity.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence for Jakarta EE 9+ compatibility.
src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/entity.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing ClassNotFoundException or compile errors if the classpath does not contain the legacy javax jar.

src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/entity.general_idea: Migrate validation annotations from javax.validation to jakarta.validation for Jakarta EE 9+ compatibility.
src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/entity.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing ClassNotFoundException or compile errors if the classpath does not contain the legacy javax jar.

src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/servic.general_idea: Replace deprecated Optional.isPresent() with Optional.isEmpty() for modern Java style.

src/test/java/com/CarRentalAgency/reposi.general_idea: Remove deprecated SpringExtension usage in favor of Spring Boot's auto-detection of JUnit 5 extensions.
src/test/java/com/CarRentalAgency/reposi.why_exists: SpringExtension is deprecated in Spring Boot 3.x and may cause warnings or conflicts; Spring Boot 3+ automatically registers the JUnit 5 extension, making the explicit annotation redundant.

src/test/java/com/CarRentalAgency/reposi.general_idea: Remove unused import for the deprecated SpringExtension class.
Remove unused import for the JUnit 5 ExtendWith annotation.

src/test/java/com/CarRentalAgency/servic.general_idea: Remove deprecated SpringExtension usage in favor of Spring Boot's automatic JUnit 5 detection.
Remove unused import for the deprecated SpringExtension class.
Remove unused import for the JUnit 5 ExtendWith annotation.
